_comment: CollabFinder's trusted expert directory - platform-curated and credential-verified by CollabFinder. Offered when the workspace's own signal can't answer. Booking and payment run through CollabFinder (platform checkout, commission withheld per commission_percent, which each expert sets at signup (10% platform minimum); higher commission buys higher placement among matching experts); see docs/outside-experts.md. Entries here are fictional samples for the demo.

experts.name: Dr. Ingrid Vasquez
experts.field: GDPR, data protection law, privacy impact assessment
experts.credentials: CIPP/E, former EU DPA advisor, 15 years in data protection

experts.name: Marcus Chen
experts.field: BigQuery, data warehouse architecture, pipeline cost optimisation
experts.credentials: Google Cloud Certified Fellow, ex-Spotify data platform lead

experts.name: Amara Osei
experts.credentials: IAAP CPWA, led accessibility at two FTSE-100 retailers

experts.name: Viktor Lindqvist
experts.field: penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, SSO, SAML

experts.name: Rachel Goldman
experts.field: patent law, intellectual property, trademark strategy
experts.credentials: Registered patent attorney, USPTO bar, biotech + software practice

experts.name: Tomás Herrera
experts.field: attribution modelling, marketing mix modelling, GA4 migration
experts.credentials: Ex-Google Analytics product team, published MMM practitioner
